description: Evaluation cases for Level Up — assertion cases verify skill behavior; trigger queries verify description optimization.

assertion_cases.name: show_agents_shows_scan_and_menu
assertion_cases.expected_behavior: Scan runs and returns a formatted list of agents grouped by project, followed by an AskUserQuestion with 4 options: Inspect, Promote & Adapt, Merge, Stats.
assertions: Output contains at least one project name in bold (**PROJECT_NAME**)
Output contains agent names with model in parens (e.g., 'fasciculus (sonnet)')
AskUserQuestion options list contains exactly these four labels: Inspect, Promote & Adapt, Merge, Stats
No second AskUserQuestion call fires before user selects an option

assertion_cases.name: stats_route_produces_report_with_budget_and_caveats
assertion_cases.expected_behavior: Skill routes to Stats action (with or without the menu). Stats subagent runs agent_stats.py --action summary --since 7d and --action unused. Output includes work tokens, total tokens, turn counts, weekly budget utilization (if available), and bulleted caveats.
assertions: Output contains 'work tokens' and 'total tokens' distinction
Output contains a per-agent table or list with turns column
If weekly_usage is available, output mentions 'weekly' with a percentage
Caveats appear as bullet points, not a single prose paragraph
If unmatched_invocations > 0, the count is surfaced

assertion_cases.name: inspect_named_agent_resolves_without_pickers
assertion_cases.expected_behavior: Skill resolves 'fasciculus' to a specific agent. If unique, no picker fires. If ambiguous across projects, one plain-text chat question disambiguates (not a second AskUserQuestion). Subagent runs the scanner with both --name and --project.
assertions: Only zero or one AskUserQuestion call fires (the action menu, if shown at all)
If multiple fasciculus agents exist, the main thread asks the user via plain chat — not AskUserQuestion — to pick the project
The inspect subagent prompt includes both --name and --project flags
Output contains the full agent markdown body

trigger_queries.notes: Run each query 3 times. Passing threshold: trigger rate > 0.5 for should-trigger, < 0.5 for should-not-trigger.

queries.query: create a new agent for code review
show usage stats for my API calls
